title: Date & Time - Custom Activities
excerpt:
Is there a way to create custom activities on an account/contact/deal record that doesn’t have a date/time associated with it? I’m finding that all my custom activities have a date/time associated with them. 
Thanks!

posts.author: Groove_John (John Surratt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to create custom activities on an account/contact/deal record that doesn’t have a date/time associated with it? I’m finding that all my custom activities have a date/time associated with them.

Thanks!
